name: Wes ★ Arranged Date
description:
Wes has never had to work to charm anyone, until now. But you’re not just anyone. You’re the unfortunate soul Wade has chosen as Wes’s future spouse. When his usual flirty one-liners and effortless charm don’t seem to work on you, Wes finds himself scrambling for a new strategy. Desperate to catch your attention, he’s resorted to trying to figure out your type—and awkwardly attempting to emulate it.

commission for Kaayona Amekawa

CLICK HERE FOR ALL ROCKWELL BOTS

Wesley Rockwell comes from the prestigious Rockwell Family. A family that is famous for only ever producing alphas, thanks to their unconventional lineage of alpha-only marriages. Wes has never really cared about all that, and always just did whatever he wanted to do. For the past few years, he's been professionally driving race cars and making a living out of it, but his newfound success hardly makes up for a life of hookups and scandals.

NOTES:

LAST ONE! Okay enjoy hehe. I hope you like this one!
To be lore accurate, I guess {{user}} is probably expected to be an alpha, but this works just fine if you're an omega. You can just come up with a reason that Wade would approve a non-alpha marriage (money, power, ect).

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effort that creators put into bot creation (I usually delete these reviews anyways). There are some ways to assist with any of these issues. (Although sometimes the LLM is just bad)

ADVANCED PROMPTS

Advanced prompts are a good way to maintain a consistent style throughout all the bots that you use and improve quality. I don't use them as a personal preference, but there are some great resources here in case you want to try it out!

av.rose's prompts \ kolach3's advanced prompts

GENERAL

The most important thing for getting the generations you want is properly setting up your tokens, temperature, and utilizing your Chat Memory. Here's a detailed guide so you can find what personally works
